thinking.text: The user is satisfied and doesn't need any further assistance. I should provide a friendly closing message.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
You're very welcome, Wei! I'm glad I could help you understand what happened with your referrals and get you set up with a new Platinum Rewards Card referral.

**Quick recap of what we covered:**
- Your Bronze and Gold referrals completed successfully
- Your Platinum referral was rejected due to the rolling 7-day limit (now resolved)
- Your Silver referral is still in progress
- You've generated a new Platinum referral link to share with your friend

If you have any questions in the future about your referrals, credit cards, or anything else, don't hesitate to reach out. Have a great day! 🎉
